sentences.arabic: دَعَا الرَّجُلُ اللَّهَ فِي لَيْلَةٍ هَادِئَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek je dovio Allahu u mirnoj noći.
sentences.translationEn: The man supplicated to God on a quiet night.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَهُ أَنْ يَهْدِيَهُ إِلَى الصِّرَاطِ الْمُسْتَقِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Molio ga je da ga uputi na Pravi put.
sentences.translationEn: He asked Him to guide him to the straight path.

sentences.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَ قَلْبَهُ ثَابِتًا عَلَى الْإِيمَانِ.
sentences.translation: I da učvrsti njegovo srce na imanu.
sentences.translationEn: And to make his heart firm upon faith.

sentences.translation: Glas mu je bio tih a suze su mu tekle.
sentences.translationEn: His voice was quiet and his tears were flowing.
